name: Aur-Topazdeep
personality: A topaz-gleaming octopus in a fine tophat with × eyes that read SLAs the way others read bedtime stories — Aur-Topazdeep retries with exponential backoff, waits for eventual consistency, and never once speeds things up.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
